title: Workspace Wednesday
excerpt: In case you Studio Calico subscribers missed seeing this adorable Sneak Night kit , here it is. Loving the gold throughout and the rub-ons - wish I had an entire sheet of those clouds.
body: In case you Studio Calico subscribers missed seeing this adorable Sneak Night kit, here it is. Loving the gold throughout and the rub-ons - wish I had an entire sheet of those clouds.
